pr.title: [non-record track] BankLinear: cross-layer shared weight bank with learned + random mixtures

output.summary: BankLinear builds QKV weights by mixing layer-specific coefficients over a shared learned + random bank, freeing parameters to enlarge the MLP.
techniques: shared bank of learned and random basis matrices
per-layer mixing coefficients with depth-aware init
reinvest saved params into larger MLP expansion
